overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from a first-person perspective showing a character swimming through open ocean toward a rocky coastline, then entering shallow water and standing up. Features realistic water shaders and natural coastal environment with scattered clouds.

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through open ocean water toward the distant horizon

entered.detail: dark blue ocean water with gentle waves filling the lower frame
distant horizon separating the ocean from the sky
scattered white clouds against blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view of swimming through open ocean water under a partly cloudy sky. The horizon stretches across the distance with gentle waves and sunlight reflecting off the water surface. No land is visible in any direction.

events.description: rocky forested coastline becomes visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: swimming toward the shoreline with rocky cliffs and trees now visible on the left side

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with dark stone texture rising from the water
green coniferous trees growing atop the rocky cliff

segments.scene_description: As the swimmer approaches the coast, a rocky cliff with dense green trees becomes visible on the left side. The camera continues moving forward through the water, with the landmass growing larger and more detailed as the distance closes.

events.description: camera tilts downward as the character enters shallow water and stands up
water becomes shallow and clear, revealing rocky seabed and character's legs

agents.ego_description: standing up in the shallow water, looking down at the clear water revealing the rocky bottom and the character's armored legs

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible pebble and rock bottom
smooth rounded rocks visible beneath the clear water surface
sandy and pebble-strewn seabed visible through the shallow water

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down as the character enters shallow water and stands up, revealing the clear water and rocky pebble bottom beneath. The horizon and cliff exit the frame as the view focuses on the shallow seabed and the character's legs visible in the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that transitions from the isolation of the open ocean to the tactile detail of a rocky shoreline. It begins with a steady swim through deep blue water under a partly cloudy sky, where sunlight reflects off gentle waves and the horizon remains empty of land. As the camera pushes forward, a rocky cliff topped with dense green trees emerges on the left, growing larger and more detailed as the coast draws near. The scene then shifts as the character enters the shallows, with the camera tilting downward to reveal a clear, pebble-strewn seabed. Finally, the horizon and cliffs exit the frame as the character stands up, focusing the view entirely on the transparent water and the legs submerged beneath the surface.
